issues.title: [Auto] New Tuya devices found in zigbee2mqtt
Device Request - Aubess Tuya 1-gang ZigBee 3.0 Mini Smart Switch - _TZ3000_fdxihpp7 / TS0001

prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Fix: Correctly identify soil sensor and resolve mmWave radar issues
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Garage Door Controller**

   - **User:** Wuma68  

2. **Plug Energy Monitor**  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_w0qqde0g`, `_TZ3210_xzhnra8x`  
   - **Issue:** [#137](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/137)  
   - **User:** Lalla80111

5. **Moes UFO-R11**

- **Moes UFO-R11:**

## Fork Fingerprints to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks identified in this period.

1. **Update driver.compose.json**

3. **Support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor**
